items.name: All target Story design evidence exists and is ready for review
items.notes: S01-S03 are full-lld; S04 is technical-note in the Story card. All are ready-for-review / confirmed=false.

items.name: Design evidence maps to CP3-approved HLD / ADR and Feature Matrix
items.notes: Wave A report contracts, fail-closed evaluator, CR150 linkage and static-only evidence are covered; Wave B items are explicitly deferred.

items.name: LLD clarification queue has no blocking open item
items.notes: No blocking clarification remains. Implementation-time source inspection choices are agent-default within CP3 boundaries.

accepted_human_decisions.question: Confirm CR151 S01-S03 full LLDs and S04 technical-note as implementation inputs?
accepted_human_decisions.recommended_option: Approve the full CP5 design evidence batch and proceed to local/static/fixture implementation.
accepted_human_decisions.outcome: Accepted recommended option via user reply `approve CP5`.

accepted_human_decisions.question: Accept CR151 implementation sequencing and file ownership?
accepted_human_decisions.recommended_option: Accept S01 -> S02 -> S03 -> S04 sequencing; keep S01/S02 shared module serialized and S03 as CR150 linkage owner.
accepted_human_decisions.outcome: Accepted recommended option via user reply `approve CP5`.

accepted_human_decisions.question: Keep CP5 approval limited to local/static/fixture source implementation and tests?
accepted_human_decisions.recommended_option: Do not authorize real lake/NAS/provider/QMT/runtime/simulation/live/trading/broker/credential/external framework/Git remote/catalog pointer operations.
accepted_human_decisions.outcome: Accepted recommended option via user reply `approve CP5`.
